data.title: Suspicious Transaction Detected On BSC Chain Linked To StepHeroNFTs
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 21, BlockSec Phalcon reported a suspicious transaction on the BSC chain involving a contract associated with the inactive NFT project StepHeroNFTs. The transaction has been identified as a typical reentrancy attack. The contract is not open-source, and the attack has resulted in a loss of approximately $90,000.

data.title: The whale who bought SHADOW at an average price of $9.75 20 days ago has made a profit of $1.72 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to lmk.fun (formerly Scopescan), a whale has earned $1.72 million by trading Sonic Ecosystem DeFi token SHADOW.
20 days ago, the whale spent $100,700 to buy 10,324 SHADOWs at an average price of $9.75. Today, 9,300 tokens were sold at a total value of $1.629 million, with an average selling price of $175; 1,000 tokens are still held, worth about $190,000.

data.title: Security Alert Issued for Multiverse Insights Reentrancy Vulnerability
data.description: According to Odaily, security firm SlowMist has reported on the X platform that a reentrancy attack vulnerability has been detected related to Multiverse Insights (@StepHeroNFTs). Users are advised to remain vigilant and prioritize safety.

data.title: BNB Chain: usdx.money sponsors BNB AI Hack with prize money exceeding $10,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BNB Chain posted on the X platform that usdx.money sponsored BNB Chain to launch BNB AI Hack:
·Total prize money exceeds $10,000
·Accelerate AI-driven asset management on BNB Chain
·Develop with the world's top developers

data.title: Kaito founder: Staking rewards are now online, locked tokens do not participate in staking, and subsequent HODL scores are related to Kaito Connet voting rights
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Kaito founder Yu Hu posted on the X platform: Staking rewards are now online, and currently about 10% of tokens are staked, with an annualized yield of about 70%. It is expected to return to normal in the next few days.
Any locked tokens (including investors/foundations/teams) cannot participate in staking. Rewards currently come from liquidity incentives, but starting next week, this will become a net outflow due to network fees. More information about the staking function will be released.
Some users have noticed a HODL score that will increase voting rights in Kaito Connect-this is just one aspect. Genesis NFT holders and KAITO token stakers will always have priority access to everything we do at Kaito.

data.title: StepHero NFT Game Faces Reentrancy Attack Vulnerability
data.description:
According to PANews, SlowMist has issued a warning on the X platform, alerting users to a reentrancy attack vulnerability in the NFT game project StepHero. Users are advised to remain cautious.

Additionally, community reports suggest that a contract on the BSC chain may have been involved in suspicious transactions, potentially linked to the StepHero project, resulting in an estimated loss of around $90,000.

data.title: Suspicious Transaction on BNB Involving Multiverse Insights Contract Detected
data.description: According to Foresight News, Cyvers Alerts has identified a suspicious transaction on the BNB network involving the Multiverse Insights contract. The address in question received funds through Tornado Cash and has reportedly profited $89,000.

data.title: Dmail Network launches AI email assistant upgrade, supports multi-model switching function
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Dmail Network announced that its AI email assistant has undergone a major upgrade. It now supports access to two major AI models, ChatGPT and Deepseek. Users can switch freely according to their needs to achieve a smarter email editing and replying experience.
Officials said that each user will receive 20 free points for trial, and then only 10 DMAIL points will be required for each use to enjoy seamless AI communication services, helping users to handle email affairs efficiently.
This upgrade further consolidates Dmail's leading position in the field of Web3 communications, bringing users a smarter and more convenient next-generation AI-driven messaging experience.

data.title: SlowMist: A reentrancy attack vulnerability related to Multiverse Insights has been detected
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to a post by security company SlowMist on the X platform, a reentrancy attack vulnerability related to Multiverse Insights (@StepHeroNFTs) has been detected. Please always be vigilant and pay attention to safety.

data.title: Fear And Greed Index Rises To Greed Level
data.description: According to PANews, the Fear and Greed Index has seen a significant increase, reaching a score of 55, up from 49 the previous day. This shift marks a change from a neutral to a greed level, the first occurrence since February 3. The index, which ranges from 0 to 100, is calculated based on several factors: volatility (25%), market trading volume (25%), social media activity (15%), market surveys (15%), Bitcoin's market dominance (10%), and Google search trends (10%).
